evidence.snippet: ### Echodyne combines patented hardware with powerful software to create unrivaled, next-generation, commercial MESA® radar systems.
###### The market-leading short-range airborne radar combines ultra-low SWaP and high performance to extend situational awareness as far as the UAS can operate.

items.notes: Core business is MESA electronically scanned array radar sensors for UAS detection/tracking and airborne detect-and-avoid (EchoFlight for UAS platforms, EchoShield/EchoGuard as ground surveillance radar)
EchoFlight and EchoShield used as airborne/ground ISR radar payloads in defense ISR applications

evidence.snippet: EchoWare is Echodyne's next-generation software platform built on a modern, software-defined architecture. It manages and operates a network of Echodyne radars as a unified system—from single-radar tactical deployments to complex multi-site networks spanning vast operational areas.
Ground station radar for comprehensive airspace management

items.notes: EchoWare software platform for managing radar networks; UAS/AAM ground station radar for airspace management

products_categories.notes: Echodyne is primarily a radar sensor company. Multiple market verticals include Counter-UAS, UAS/AAM airspace management, Defense ISR, and border/perimeter security. Product pages for defense sub-categories (ISR, OTM, Force Protection) were skipped.

![White and blue Echodyn radar truck with mounted EchoShield equipment on its roof under a clear sky.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69148caed4c3689c36578812/69713be101056b2f6196869c_Carousel-RadarTruck.jpg)

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Echodyne sells complete radar subsystems (EchoShield, EchoGuard, EchoFlight) and accompanying software (EchoWare) to Systems Suppliers, Integrators, and End Users for UAS/C-UAS applications. They do not build complete drone platforms.

items.name: EchoFlight
items.product_type: Short-range airborne ESA radar (for UAS detect-and-avoid)

evidence.snippet:
EchoWare
========
™
### Multiple Radars. One Seamless, Managed Radar System.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69148caed4c3689c36578812/69c9e70e21c8ed9ab630fedd_16x9-EW-ForestLaptop-1.webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69148caed4c3689c36578812/69c9e758ea1193bc99e5d472_3x2-EW-ForestLaptop-1.webp)
### EchoWare delivers.
EchoWare is Echodyne's next-generation software platform built on a modern, software-defined architecture. It manages and operates a network of Echodyne radars as a unified system—from single-radar tactical deployments to complex multi-site networks spanning vast operational areas.

Designed & Built in the USA
---------------------------
Echodyne manufactures high-quality MESA radars outside Seattle, WA USA.

ndaa.notes: Site prominently states 'Designed & Built in the USA' and manufactures near Seattle, WA, but no explicit NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claim appears anywhere in the corpus.

evidence.snippet: Echodyne, the radar platform company, today announces a major near-term expansion in its advanced radar production capacity.

readiness.notes: Company expanding manufacturing to produce 30,000+ radars/year. Products have published specs, deployment kits, and color options indicating catalog production.

unresolved_questions: No NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claim found — site claims US manufacture but does not address NDAA specifically.

tagline: Kirkland-based manufacturer of metamaterials electronically scanned array (MESA) radar subsystems for defense, government, and critical infrastructure. Production-ready portfolio includes EchoShield (medium-range pulse-Doppler), EchoGuard (short-range FMCW for counter-UAS), EchoFlight (airborne detect-and-avoid), and EchoWare software. Fielded with integrators including Chess Dynamics, EOS Defense, and OpenWorks. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status not publicly disclosed.
